Financial Performance

Step-by-step savings calculation from historical benchmark to earned savings/losses.

Step Description Value MSSP Median Peer Median
1 Assigned Beneficiaries 7,836 p22 13,159 11,048
2 Historical Benchmark (per capita) $13,433 p89 $11,439 $10,773
3 Regional Adjustment +$-72
4 Prior Savings Adjustment +-
5 Adjustment Category Regional Adjustment
6 Updated Benchmark (per capita) $15,993 p90 $13,279 $12,611
7 Total Benchmark (all beneficiaries) $122,074,682
8 Total Expenditure (all beneficiaries) $113,161,735
9 Per Capita Expenditure (PY) $14,825 p86 $12,693 $12,416
10 Generated Savings / Losses $8,912,948 $6,931,306 —
11 Savings Rate 7.30% p76 4.21% 3.20%
12 Minimum Savings Rate (threshold) 3.23%
13 Guardrail Applied —
14 Final Shared Savings Rate 40.00%
15 Final Shared Loss Rate -
16 Earned Savings / Losses $3,493,875 $3,685,876 —
Revenue-to-Expense Category High Revenue

Risk Scores

Hierarchical Condition Category risk scores. A score of 1.0 = national average. Below 1.0 means the population is healthier than average.

CMS-HCC Risk Scores

Population Segment BY1BY2BY3PY Trend Coding Gap MSSP Med.
End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) 1.002 1.033 1.065 0.917 ↓ -0.058 0.967
Disabled 1.009 1.038 1.027 1.030 → +0.046 0.934
Aged, Dual-Eligible 1.047 1.056 1.039 1.074 → +0.094 0.954
Aged, Non-Dual 1.018 1.027 1.011 0.963 ↓ -0.031 0.983

Demographic Risk Scores

Demographic-only risk scores (age/sex/Medicaid status). Compared with HCC risk scores, the difference reflects clinical coding intensity.

Population Segment BY3PY
End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) — 0.975
Disabled — 0.984
Aged, Dual-Eligible — 0.980
Aged, Non-Dual — 0.994

Risk Redistribution Weights (PY)

Fraction of the ACO's total risk attributable to each population segment.

ESRD Weight 3.0%
Disabled Weight 7.8%
Aged Dual Weight 13.4%
Aged Non-Dual Weight 75.9%

Clinical Quality Measures

MSSP quality measures. Measures marked "lower is better" are inverted — a lower score indicates better performance.

Measure This ACO MSSP Median Peer Median
Overall Quality Score (Composite) p18 77.05 83.13 77.60
All-Cause Unplanned Admissions (risk-adjusted rate) (lower is better) ? p88 0.16 0.15 0.16

Peer Cohort

30 similar mid-size, BASIC-track, average acuity, rural infrastructure ACOs

View 30 peer ACOs
A2202A3724A3664A3722A5334A3694A3698A5399A2612A2528A3723A3731A5169A3712A4984A5403A2599A3320A5421A3555A5148A5191A3621A4566A3714A2083A3644A2299A3579A4678

Peers selected using weighted distance across 15 structural features (population acuity, composition, scale, care infrastructure, assignment type) within the BASIC track partition. Learn more

Methodology

Data source: MSSP ACO Performance PY2024 (dataset ID: mssp-performance). Vintage: PY2024. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 476.

MSSP ACO Performance reports financial and quality performance for Accountable Care Organizations participating in the Medicare Shared Savings Program. Savings/losses are calculated against risk-adjusted, regionally-weighted benchmarks.

Full methodology →

MIT License. Free. No ads. No login.
